name: xuanji
description: 璇玑 (Xuanji) — 开源 AI 助手

scripts.dev:gui: npm run build && (cd desktop && npm run build:agent-bridge) && concurrently -n "SRC,GUI" -c "cyan,green" "npm run build:watch" "wait-on dist/index.js && cd desktop && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:src
scripts.build:src: tsup --entry src/index.ts --entry src/infrastructure/acp/acp-worker.ts --format esm --target esnext --outDir dist --external tree-sitter --external tree-sitter-typescript --external tree-sitter-python --external tree-sitter-java --external @larksuiteoapi/node-sdk
scripts.build:gui: cd desktop && npm run build:pre && electron-builder
scripts.build:gui:mac: cd desktop && npm_config_build_from_source=true npm run build:pre && npm_config_build_from_source=true electron-builder --mac --x64
scripts.build:gui:mac:arm64: cd desktop && npm_config_build_from_source=true npm run build:pre && npm_config_build_from_source=true electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.build:gui:mac:universal: cd desktop && npm run build:pre && electron-builder --mac --universal
scripts.build:gui:win: cd desktop && npm run build:pre && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.build:gui:all: cd desktop && npm run build:pre && electron-builder --mac --win --x64

author: Shibit <dev@shibit.net>
